notes: target hit requires all expected_laws to be present; expected_articles are also required when provided.
This baseline is for deterministic retrieval diagnostics and does not run an LLM judge.
All 30 baseline samples include ground_truth, so generated answers can be converted to RAGAS reference fields.
Do not delete known misses to improve the score; use them as regression targets for retrieval optimization.
